_description: Tests FR-014: conditional rows evaluated before plain rows; first match wins

_test_cases.description: When if condition matches, first conditional row wins over plain row
_test_cases.rationale: Row 1 has if=true condition; evaluated first; wins

_test_cases.description: When no conditional row matches, first plain row fires
_test_cases.rationale: Row 1 condition false; Row 2 has no condition; plain fallback fires
